Metadata.title: Numainda
Metadata.description: A chatbot that answers questions about Pakistan's constitution, elections act, and parliamentary proceedings.

Home.title: What would you like to know?
Home.subtitle: Your AI guide to Pakistan's constitution, laws, and parliament
Home.chatPlaceholder: Ask anything about Pakistan's constitution, laws, elections...

suggestions.pmElection: How is the Prime Minister elected?

About.title: Meet Numainda
About.subtitle: Your Digital Gateway to Pakistan's Constitution and Legislative Knowledge
About.originalVisionDesc: Numainda began as a parliamentary monitoring system, tracking attendance, voting patterns, and legislative performance metrics.
About.pivotDesc: User research revealed a deeper need: making constitutional knowledge accessible. We transformed into an AI-powered constitutional guide.
About.todayDesc: Now a comprehensive platform connecting citizens with their representatives, constitutional knowledge, and legislative information through AI-powered search and natural conversations.
About.mediaArticleTitle: Say Hello to My New Friend
About.mediaArticleDesc: Read about how Numainda is transforming constitutional literacy in Pakistan through the power of AI and human-centered design.

features.representativesDesc: Complete database of National Assembly members with contact information and constituencies
features.locationDesc: Find your representative using your device location or search by constituency
features.chatDesc: Ask questions about constitution, laws, and representatives in natural language
features.availableDesc: Constitutional and legislative guidance available round the clock
features.searchDesc: Smart search understands context and finds relevant information across multiple sources
features.languageDesc: Complex legal concepts and parliamentary processes explained in everyday terms

Chat.disclaimer: Numainda can make mistakes. Verify important legal information.
Chat.welcomeMessage: Hello! I am Numainda, your guide to Pakistan's constitutional and electoral information. How may I assist you today?
